sections.description: A complete restaurant menu management system with multiple menus, categories, featured items, dietary badges, photo support, shortcodes, and Google Schema.org structured data.
sections.changelog:
1.5.4

  • Fixed: Filter by Menu on items list now correctly matches items — was using quoted string LIKE which never matched PHP serialized integers
  • Fixed: [restaurant_menu] and [rmm_featured_item] shortcodes had same serialization bug; menus with assigned items now display correctly

1.5.3

  • Settings page redesigned: Typography in right column, Shortcode Reference in left column, class name controls added to typography

1.5.2

  • Added [rmm_info] shortcode

1.5.1

  • Fixed plugin slug and update URL

1.5.0

  • Layout shortcode attribute, [rmm_featured_item], typography controls

1.0.0

  • Initial release
